docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY ANDERSON, JUDITH AS TO DEFENDANT ZEIDAN, AMJED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2012 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED JAN-15-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZEIDAN, AMJED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, JUDITH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZEIDAN, AMJED $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,090.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ZEIDAN, AMJED
